noEdge: No edge data for this match.
noValidatedOpportunity: No opportunity validated by the current criteria.
edgeConsensusTooltip: Shows how far our model probability is above or below the market implied probability after margin adjustment. The higher the edge, the larger the gap between model and market.
executableValueTooltip: Shows the expected return of the bet based on the model probability and the available odd. Positive EV indicates positive expected value over the long run.
